strings.clearCacheTitle: 🚨 STREAK AT RISK: Are you absolutely sure? Clearing the cache will reset your entire language tree. Your Lingots, your custom outfits, and your 500-day streak will be incinerated. Duo will be very, very disappointed in you. Do you want to go back to being a 'Total Beginner'?
